name: ai-native-methodology
description: ★ ★ ★ v2.0 — SDLC 4단계 chain harness (legacy → planning → spec → test → impl). chain harness validated (5 요소 코드 enforcement + 198 unit test + ≥ 2 PoC corroboration). 1차 single-case = legacy-extraction 모드 / round-trip = chain harness gate 안에서 정식 허용 / 70~80% 한계 명시 잔존.
